name: BeLive Studios
industry: Digital content production, IP creation, microdrama, short-form storytelling
positioning: Category-defining creative core of an OTT-native content ecosystem — full-stack IP studio for storytelling, microdrama, and cinematic production.
differentiator: Strong capabilities in microdrama development, cinematic storytelling, and agile production — operating in tandem with Yeon Studios' OTT infrastructure.

voice.description: Cinematic, emotionally driven, and culturally sharp. Speaks in stories, emotion, and cultural relevance — not specs.
characteristics: Speaks in stories, emotion, and cultural relevance — not specs
Positions as the creative force behind IP that connects with audiences
Bold and confident, with cultural awareness
Category-defining: introduces new language for a new format

off_limits: Overly corporate, dry, or technical tone

primary: Brand managers and marketing leads seeking content partnerships
Event organizers in entertainment and media
Journalists and press covering content, IP, and streaming
OTT platform operators seeking original IP
audience.language: English first. Bilingual only if a specific audience segment requires it.

content_pillars.name: Storytelling & IP Creation
content_pillars.description: How BeLive Studios develops microdramas, original IP, and cinematic content

content_pillars.name: Behind the Production
content_pillars.description: Behind-the-scenes of shoots, creative process, cast and crew moments

content_pillars.name: Industry Thought Leadership
content_pillars.description: Insights on microdrama trends, short-form content, the future of storytelling

content_pillars.name: Client Wins & Portfolio
content_pillars.description: Highlights from completed productions and successful IP

content_pillars.name: Events & Cultural Moments
content_pillars.description: Recaps, announcements, and timely cultural angles

approval.operational_owner: Kevin or assigned social media manager

success_metrics_3_month: 3–5 strategic OTT or content partnerships secured
10–20 qualified inbound leads (brands, platforms, IP collaborators)
Strong positioning as category leader in microdrama production + IP creation
